caption: Step 1: Open eBay Advanced Search
narration: Here is the opening move. Let's start by opening eBay Advanced Search. This gives the whole demo a place to stand.
fallback_narration: We start by opening eBay Advanced Search. That gives the workflow a stage.

caption: Step 2: Enter main search keywords
narration: With the setup in place, we can chase the signal. We enter main search keywords. This is the sort of repetition the workflow should steal from us.
fallback_narration: Next, we enter main search keywords. This is where repetition gets retired.

caption: Step 3: Change the keyword match dropdown to exact order
description: Change the keyword match dropdown to exact order
narration: Now the page has something to say. We change the keyword match dropdown to exact order.
fallback_narration: Change the keyword match dropdown to exact order.

caption: Step 4: Enter words to exclude from results
description: Enter words to exclude from results
narration: This is where the pattern starts to show. We enter words to exclude from results.
fallback_narration: Next, we enter words to exclude from results. This is where repetition gets retired.

caption: Step 5: Include title and description in the search scope
description: Include title and description in the search scope
narration: Here the workflow stops posing and starts proving. We include title and description in the search scope.
fallback_narration: Include title and description in the search scope.

caption: Step 6: Set minimum and maximum price filters
description: Set minimum and maximum price filters
narration: Now the payoff is close enough to see. We set minimum and maximum price filters.
fallback_narration: Next, we set minimum and maximum price filters. That keeps the run honest.

caption: Step 7: Filter for new-condition items
narration: This is where the result starts to feel earned. We filter for new-condition items. It keeps the flow easy to follow without sounding like a checklist.

caption: Step 8: Run the search and open the filtered results page
description: Run the search and open the filtered results page
narration: That lands the result. We run the search and open the filtered results page. This is where all the quiet setup finally earns applause.
